leakDetected: types.ts (effect schema, instructed to read) contains a comment at the targetStatus kind that explicitly names 'privaty' and her 'Designated Target' mechanic: 'Next expected: privaty's Designated Target (her skill-2 rider when the last bullet hits a target in Designated Target status) — NOT enacted, still measurement-gated.' This leaks the unit slug and a key cross-skill dependency into the redacted methodology. Reasoned from prose anyway; the leak confirmed the MEASUREMENT-GATED disposition for the Designated Target status + gated rider.

spec.scope: all allies (team-wide ATK buff, includes self)
spec.triggerIdentity: fullBurstEnter — 'Activates when entering Full Burst' fires on ANY team Full Burst, not just privaty's own burstCast. Diverges from burstCast in multi-B3 comps (e.g. control comp has helm B3 too).
spec.nearestWrongModel: burstCast instead of fullBurstEnter. In a 2-B3 comp (privaty + helm), burstCast fires every ~40s (privaty's own CD); fullBurstEnter fires every ~20s (alternating B3s). This halves the ATK buff uptime.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: In a comp with 2 B3 units, count buff applications over 180s: faithful (fullBurstEnter) ≈ 9 applications (one per FB cycle ~20s); nearest-wrong (burstCast) ≈ 4-5 (only privaty's own bursts ~40s). Assert application count >= 8.
spec.inertness: Must NOT apply to enemies. Must NOT be active outside FB windows. Must NOT stack across FB cycles (refreshes).

spec.nearestWrongModel: Dropping as 'utility' — but reload speed is a weapon-state modifier that gates shot count (rule 6). Faster reloads = more shots per FB window = more lastBullet procs for skill2.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: During FB, privaty's reload must take 81/(1+0.5116) ≈ 53.6 frames, not 81. Count shots fired in a 10s FB window: faithful > nearest-wrong (omitted) by the reload-time savings.
spec.inertness: Must NOT apply outside FB. Must NOT change damage per hit (only cadence).

spec.scope: all allies (team-wide ammo reduction — a DEBUFF on magazine size)
spec.nearestWrongModel: Dropping as 'defensive/penalty' — this is the MOST damage-relevant line in skill1 for privaty. Halving her 60-round magazine to ~30 rounds DOUBLES her lastBullet frequency during FB, which doubles her skill2 proc rate (256.17% rider + Damage Taken debuff). A model that drops this under-estimates FB-window damage by a large margin.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: During FB, privaty's effective magazine must be ~30 rounds (60 × (1-0.5066) ≈ 29.6). Count lastBullet events in a 10s FB window: faithful ≈ 2× the count when maxAmmoPct is omitted. Assert lastBullet count during FB >= 2× lastBullet count outside FB (per unit time).
spec.inertness: Must NOT apply outside FB. Must NOT increase ammo (value is negative: -50.66). Must expire after 10s.

spec.scope: all allies (team-wide Damage Up bucket buff)
spec.nearestWrongModel: Confusing attackDamagePct (Damage Up bucket) with atkPct (ATK bucket). These are SEPARATE multiplicative terms in the damage formula. atkPct scales base ATK; attackDamagePct is in the Damage Up bucket alongside elementDamagePct, chargeDamagePct, etc.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: The 20.16% must appear in the attackDamagePct stat key, NOT atkPct. Verify via damage decomposition: the Damage Up bucket multiplier must include 1.2016 during FB; the ATK bucket must be unchanged by this line.
spec.inertness: Must NOT apply outside FB. Must NOT be encoded as atkPct.

spec.scope: enemy (boss DEBUFF — 'Affects the target' = the enemy, not self/allies)
spec.triggerIdentity: lastBullet — fires when privaty's last bullet hits the target (per-magazine, not per-shot).
spec.nearestWrongModel: Encoding as a self/ally buff instead of a boss debuff. 'Affects the target' in skill2 context = the enemy being shot. damageTakenPct is a boss debuff that benefits the WHOLE team (rule 4), not a self-buff.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: The damageTakenPct debuff must be applied to the BOSS (enemy), not to privaty. Verify: team-wide damage must increase ~10% while the debuff is active. If mis-encoded as a self-buff, only privaty's damage would change (and incorrectly).
spec.inertness: Must NOT fire on every shot — only on lastBullet (once per magazine). Must NOT target self/allies.

spec.kitLine: 256.17% of final ATK as additional damage (lastBullet→enemy)
spec.triggerIdentity: lastBullet — fires once per magazine when the last bullet hits. NOT every shot. noFb: omitted/false (lastBullet riders take FB by timing, rule 9). noRange: true (riders universally excluded from +30% range). core: false (no 'core strike damage' text). crit: default (riders crit at caster rate).
spec.nearestWrongModel: Firing on every shot (shotFired) instead of only lastBullet. This would over-credit the 256.17% rider by ~60× (once per shot vs once per magazine). Alternatively: encoding noFb:true, which would incorrectly exclude it from the +50% FB bonus.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: Count 256.17% flatDamage events: must equal lastBullet count (once per magazine), NOT shot count. In a 180s fight with ~60-round magazines, expect ~30 procs (not ~1800). Assert flatDamage event count == lastBullet event count. Also: during FB, the hit must receive the +50% FB major (noFb omitted).
spec.inertness: Must NOT fire on non-last bullets. Must NOT be noRange:false. Must NOT core.

spec.kitLine: 1687% of final ATK (lastBullet + Designated Target gate)
spec.scope: enemy (instant flatDamage rider, GATED on boss carrying 'Designated Target' status)
spec.triggerIdentity: lastBullet + requiresTargetStatus: 'Designated Target'. The gate is critical: this 1687% rider fires ONLY when the lastBullet coincides with an active Designated Target status on the boss. Designated Target is applied by privaty's burst (10s duration). Without the status, this line is dead.
spec.nearestWrongModel: Encoding as UNGATED (fires on every lastBullet regardless of Designated Target status). This would massively over-credit privaty's damage — 1687% per magazine instead of only during the post-burst 10s window. Alternatively: dropping the line entirely, which would under-credit.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: The 1687% hit must NOT fire when Designated Target is absent. It must fire ONLY when lastBullet coincides with active Designated Target status (applied by burst, 10s window). Assert: 1687% events occur only within 10s of privaty's burst cast; zero events outside that window.
spec.inertness: Must NOT fire without the status gate. Must NOT fire on non-last bullets.

spec.kitLine: Elemental Advantage Attack Damage ▲ 130% for 10 sec (self)
spec.scope: self only ('Affects self' — NOT all allies)
spec.triggerIdentity: burstCast — this is in the burst block, self-targeted. Fires ONLY when privaty casts her own burst. NOT fullBurstEnter (which fires on any team FB). In a multi-B3 comp, burstCast fires every ~40s; fullBurstEnter would fire every ~20s.
spec.nearestWrongModel: fullBurstEnter instead of burstCast. In a 2-B3 comp, this would over-fire the 130% buff (applying it on helm's bursts too). Alternatively: encoding as target 'allies' instead of 'self', which would over-credit the whole team.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: The 130% elemAdvantageDamagePct buff must apply ONLY to privaty (self), and ONLY on her own burstCast. In a comp with another B3, assert: buff is active after privaty's burst; buff is NOT active after the other B3's burst (when privaty did not cast). Also: buff must be in elemAdvantageDamagePct (Damage Up bucket, active only with elemental advantage), NOT elementDamagePct.
spec.inertness: Must NOT apply to allies. Must NOT fire on fullBurstEnter. Must NOT be active without elemental advantage (Water vs Fire in control comp = advantaged, so it IS live there).

spec.kitLine: 1407.64% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage (enemy)
spec.triggerIdentity: burstCast — fires when privaty casts her burst. noFb: TRUE (rule 9: 'burst-cast/instant damage is always FB-exempt — a burst CAST lands before the FB window opens'). noRange: true (riders universally excluded). core: false.
spec.targetSet: enemy (all enemies, but sim has single boss)
spec.nearestWrongModel: Omitting noFb:true, causing the 1407.64% to incorrectly receive the +50% Full Burst major. This would inflate burst damage by 50% (1407.64% × 1.5 = 2111.46% effective). The burst CAST lands BEFORE the FB window opens, so it cannot benefit from FB.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: The 1407.64% hit must be noFb:true. Assert: burst damage event must NOT carry the +50% FB multiplier. If noFb is omitted, the burst hit would show 1.5× the expected damage during FB windows.
spec.inertness: Must NOT apply to allies. Must NOT receive FB major. Must NOT be range-eligible.

spec.nearestWrongModel: N/A — stun is inert in the sim (boss is immortal, deals no damage to player team; stun prevents boss actions but the sim models no boss actions).
spec.distinguishingAssertion: N/A — stun has no damage effect in the sim. No assertion needed.
spec.inertness: Stun must NOT affect player-team damage output.

spec.scope: enemy — two sub-effects: (a) apply 'Designated Target' targetStatus for 10s (gates skill2 1687% rider); (b) boss ATK ▼ 5.02% (inert in sim — boss ATK does not affect player damage).
spec.durationSemantics: durationSec: 10 for both the status and the ATK debuff
spec.triggerIdentity: burstCast — applied when privaty casts her burst. The targetStatus application is the CRITICAL cross-skill dependency: without it, skill2 block 2b (1687%) never fires.
spec.nearestWrongModel: Dropping the targetStatus application entirely, which would make skill2 block 2b (1687%) permanently dead. Alternatively: encoding the ATK ▼ as a player-facing debuff instead of a boss debuff.
spec.distinguishingAssertion: After privaty's burst, the 'Designated Target' status must be active on the boss for 10s. Skill2 block 2b (1687%) must fire during this window on lastBullet. Without the targetStatus, assert: zero 1687% events in the entire fight. The ATK ▼ 5.02% is inert (boss ATK irrelevant).
spec.inertness: ATK ▼ must NOT affect player-team stats. Status must NOT persist beyond 10s.

notes: LEAK: types.ts targetStatus comment names 'privaty' and 'Designated Target' explicitly — declared in leakDetected. HIGHEST-RISK SHARED MISREAD: (1) Max Ammunition ▼ 50.66% dropped as 'defensive penalty' — it is the single most damage-relevant skill1 line for privaty (doubles lastBullet freq during FB, gating all skill2 procs). (2) skill1 trigger misread as burstCast instead of fullBurstEnter — halves buff uptime in multi-B3 comps. (3) Burst damage noFb omitted — inflates burst nuke by 50%. (4) Designated Target status gate dropped from skill2 1687% rider — would over-credit by ~1687% per magazine instead of only post-burst. The Designated Target mechanism (targetStatus application on burst + requiresTargetStatus gate on skill2 1687%) is MEASUREMENT-GATED per the types.ts comment ('NOT enacted, still measurement-gated') — the driver must reconcile whether to encode it now or flag it. The ATK ▼ 5.02% boss debuff and the 3s stun are both inert in the sim (boss deals no damage, boss ATK irrelevant).
